last_item: Band D (Dashboard): Dashboard → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Dashboard.tsx on shadcn Card composition (Card/CardHeader/CardTitle/CardContent) for the Postgres, Latest-backup and Server panels — replacing the hand-rolled ui.tsx Card wrapper (kept for 8 unmigrated views). Host-metric tiles moved off ui.tsx's StatCard to a LOCAL StatCard built on Card size='sm' with semantic threshold tinting (text-warning/text-destructive); deleted StatCard from ui.tsx (Dashboard was its only consumer). Hand-rolled layout classes → Tailwind semantic tokens: card-grid→'grid gap-5 sm:grid-cols-2', stat-grid→'grid grid-cols-2 gap-3.5 sm:grid-cols-4', kv-list/kv→semantic <dl>/<dt>/<dd> rows ('flex justify-between … border-b border-dashed last:border-b-0'), bullet-list→'list-disc pl-5', updated-at/muted→text-muted-foreground. First-load <Spinner> swapped for a <Skeleton> placeholder (role=status + aria-label='Loading dashboard…'). Behavior identical: same poll cadence + data, same 3 render states (skeleton / hard ErrorNotice / live cards), same StaleBanner on a failed refresh over cached data, same warn Callout when no backup exists. A11y on authored markup: each <dl> aria-label'd, refresh timestamp wrapped in <time dateTime>. Deleted dead .card-grid/.stat-*/.kv-*/.updated-at CSS (Dashboard-only; .bullet-list kept — RolesDatabases still uses it). Updated Dashboard.test.tsx +2 (labeled loading skeleton; live Postgres/Server cards render).
last_result: green: typecheck, 101 web tests (+2), build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer: ACCEPTED the two zero-risk a11y nits on my own markup (dl aria-label; <time dateTime>). DECLINED the rest with reasons: the 'Card name collision' is a non-issue (Dashboard imports the shadcn Card explicitly from @/components/ui/card, never the ui.tsx wrapper); role=alert on the shared Callout/StaleBanner is PRE-EXISTING shared-component behavior (prior Dashboard used the identical components — no regression, and React won't re-announce unchanged text per poll); removing the duplicated Connections StatCard would change displayed data (breaks behavior parity). Next in band D: RolesDatabases. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
